---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something to add or improve
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the situation where this would help. What are you trying to do that Argus doesn't support today?

**What would you like to happen?**
Describe the feature. If you have a specific idea for how it should work, include that.

**Which cloud(s) does this apply to?**
- [ ] AWS
- [ ] GCP
- [ ] Azure
- [ ] All clouds

**Anything else?**
Links, prior art, related issues, or anything else relevant.
